attack_patterns.mitre_technique: T1021 / T1059 - Remote Services / Command Interpreter

verification_steps: MITRE: T1548 - Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
MITRE: T1021 / T1059 - Remote Services / Command Interpreter
MITRE: T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact

attack_narrative: The attack originated from 185.220.101.47 targeting FINSERV-DB01, gaining initial foothold through exploitation of a network-accessible service. Following injection, the compromised process established a covert C2 communication channel to 91.108.56.130 over HTTPS, with the TLS certificate issued by an unexpected authority — a hallmark of attacker-controlled infrastructure masquerading as legitimate services. The attack chain represents a complete APT intrusion lifecycle: obfuscated execution, process injection for persistence, and beaconing to external C2 infrastructure — consistent with a Cobalt Strike or similar commercial implant deployment.
containment_actions: BLOCK IP 185.220.101.47 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
BLOCK IP 203.45.67.89 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
BLOCK IP 91.108.56.130 at perimeter firewall and all internal segment boundaries
ISOLATE host CVE-2024 immediately — disconnect from all network segments
ISOLATE host FINSERV-DB01 immediately — disconnect from all network segments
ISOLATE host FINSERV-DC01 immediately — disconnect from all network segments
ISOLATE host FINSERV-FILE01 immediately — disconnect from all network segments
SUSPEND account 'svc_backup' and invalidate all active sessions
COLLECT forensic image of: C:\Windows\System32\lsass.exe
PRESERVE all Sysmon, network, and endpoint logs for legal/forensic proceedings
NOTIFY CISO and legal team — assess breach notification obligations
